1̲ See Details. ", "data": "

PREQUALIFICATION: CHECKING WON'T AFFECT YOUR CREDIT SCORE. APPLYING MAY RESULT IN A HARD INQUIRY

Eligibility check uses a soft credit inquiry and won't affect your credit score. If you choose to proceed with a full application, this will result in a hard inquiry and may impact your credit score.

1$200 STATEMENT CREDIT OFFER DETAILS

When you are approved for a new Shop Your Way 5321 Visa® Credit Card and use it to make $200 or more in total qualifying purchases with Shop Your Way partners within the first 90 days of account opening, you will receive a $200 Statement Credit. Qualifying purchases may be made in multiple transactions and do not need to be made in a single purchase. Purchases must post to your account during the 90-day promotional period that begins on your account opening date. This offer is only available for new Shop Your Way 5321 Visa accounts opened through March 31, 2027. Existing accounts are not eligible.

Your account must be open and in good standing at the time the Statement Credit is applied. Statement Credit will post within 10 business days after the qualifying purchase threshold is met, and qualifying purchases have posted to your account. The Statement Credit reduces your balance, but does not count as a payment. You must still make your minimu m monthly payment. Limit one offer per new account. Offer is not transferable, and cannot be combined with any other introductory offer. Terms may change without notice, but changes will not affect accounts already opened under this offer.

The following types of transactions do not qualify as eligible purchases and will not earn Points or a Statement Credit: cash equivalents, balance transfers, disputes or fraudulent transactions, interest & fees, and gambling transactions. Additional exclusions apply. Participating Shop Your Way partners are:

Sears, Sears.com, Kmart, Kmart.com, SearsPartsDirect.com, Sears Home Services In-Home Repair, Sears Home Services Protection Agreements, Sears Home Warranty.

5321 Visa® Credit Cards are issued by First Bank & Trust, Brookings, SD pursuant to a license from Visa U.S.A., Inc. Visa is a registered trademark of Visa International Service Association. Marks used herein are service marks of First Bank & Trust.
